response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified it as a live concert performance by Omaru Polka. 2. Noted the title 'ETERNAL BLAZE' on-screen. 3. Used the search tool to confirm 'ETERNAL BLAZE' is originally by Nana Mizuki. 4. Retrieved the original Japanese lyrics and an English translation. 5. Mapped the scenes based on visual changes (intro/start of song) and populated the JSON fields accordingly.
response.global_summary: The video features a live concert performance by VTuber Omaru Polka, who sings 'ETERNAL BLAZE' (originally by Nana Mizuki). The performance includes stage lighting effects and choreography with backup dancers.

scenes.description: The video starts with shots of a dark stage with red heart-shaped lighting and fans in the audience, before the stage lights up. No singing yet.
Omaru Polka begins singing 'ETERNAL BLAZE' on stage, accompanied by backup dancers. The title 'ETERNAL BLAZE' and composer credits are displayed.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
遥か天空（そら）響いている 祈りは奇跡に
黒天 -真夜中- の蒼に溶けて 流れてく涙の粒
迷いなく包み込む 温もりに出逢った
真っ白な雪のように どこまでも素直なコトバ
鉄の羽根纏った 僕を動かしてく

傷つくたびに優しくなれる
君のその笑顔だけ守り抜きたい
願いはひとつ

時空（とき）を越え刻まれた 悲しみの記憶
まっすぐに受け止める 君は光の女神（てんし）
あの日胸に灯った 永遠の炎
深い闇解き放って 自由のトビラ開いてく
強く果てない未来へ

冷たい緑の月に 映し出すココロの夜（かげ）
淋し気に呟いた『君のそばにいたい』
真実と向き合うこと 教えてくれた勇気は
僕を駆け巡って 希望（ゆめ）に目覚めていく

触れ合う気持ち 離れないように
しっかりと抱きしめて
確かな想い 貫いてゆく

銀の海に隠した 空白のページ
君だけが知っている『本当』を僕に見せて
吹き荒れる切なさに 生まれゆく誓い
もう何も恐くはないよ 結んだ視線そらさずに
大切な『今』始める

君が君でいられる場所
悪夢 -まぼろし- にさらわれぬように
消えない雨の苦しみも
鍵を壊してぶつけてよ 隣にいるから
すべてを信じて

時空を越え刻まれた 悲しみの記憶
まっすぐに受け止める 君は光の女神（てんし）
あの日胸に灯った 永遠の炎
深い闇解き放って 自由のトビラ開いてく
強く果てない未来へ

そう、きっとここから始まる...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Far away, in the sky, a prayer is echoing, turning into a miracle.
Melting into the blue of the midnight, droplets of flowing tears.
Wrapped without hesitation, I met a warmth.
Like pure white snow, words that are honest to the end.
The iron wings I wore, push me forward.
Every time I get hurt, I become kinder.
I want to protect only your smile, the wish is one.
Memories of sadness carved across time and space,
You who accept it straight, are a goddess of light.
The eternal flame that lit up in my chest that day,
Unleashing the deep darkness, opening the door of freedom,
To a strong and endless future.
Cold green moon, reflecting the shadows of the heart.
Whispering lonely, 'I want to be by your side'.
The courage that taught me to face the truth,
Runs through me, awakening to hope.
So that the feelings touching each other don't separate,
Hold it tightly, piercing through the certain thoughts.
Blank pages hidden in the silver sea,
Show me the 'truth' that only you know.
A vow born from the raging heartache,
I'm not afraid of anything anymore, without averting my eyes.
Starting the precious 'now'.
The place where you can be yourself,
So as not to be carried away by nightmares,
Even the suffering of the never-ending rain,
Break the key and throw it at me, because I am by your side.
Believe in everything.
Memories of sadness carved across time and space,
You who accept it straight, are a goddess of light.
The eternal flame that lit up in my chest that day,
Unleashing the deep darkness, opening the door of freedom,
To a strong and endless future.
Yes, it surely begins from here...
